title: Junior Business Development Manager at Housing.com

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Housing.com
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Housing.com in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
